     the Fermi energy is     3.4059 ev

!    total energy              =   -8074.32933402 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <          4.1E-10 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.28707355 Ry

     The total energy is F=E-TS. E is the sum of the following terms:
     one-electron contribution = -167993.44796190 Ry
